---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
updated: "2026-05-22T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host
key: sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host
state: active
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - milestone-3
  - self-hosting
title: "milestone 3: self-hosting compiler (sv0 in sv0)"
type: task
roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
---

# milestone 3: self-hosting compiler

## purpose

match [vision and design](http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html) **milestone 3**: the **sv0 compiler is fully implemented in sv0**, reaches **feature parity** with the SML compiler (including a **fully functional VM** path), compiles **itself**, and the **SML bootstrap** is **tagged and moved to legacy** (see **stakeholder decisions**).

## dependencies

/require: bash

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc

## prerequisites

- design milestone 2 complete enough: VM iteration path + prep tasks advanced so sv0 codebase for the compiler is realistic (`task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`, `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`)

## layout decision

The self-hosting **compiler in sv0** lives entirely inside the **sv0c** repository (not a sibling top-level `sv0-compiler/` tree in the meta-repo). **Until SML retirement:** bootstrap sources live under **`sv0c/sml/`**. **At retirement (tag `bootstrap-sml-final`):** that tree moves to **`sv0c/sml-legacy/`**; default builds do not compile SML (see stakeholder decisions). **sv0 transliteration** continues in **`sv0c/lib/`** (see `sv0c/lib/README.md`, `lib/LAYOUT.md`, `./scripts/sv0 bootstrap-build`) and parallel dirs (**`lexer/`**, **`parser/`**, â€¦).

## stakeholder decisions (implementation bar)

These choices unblock scope, CI, and transliteration priority. **Do not** move **`sml/`** or drop SML from default workflows **until** the completion criteria below are met.

### bootstrap and retirement

- **End state:** compiler **fully in sv0**; **SML** removed from the **default** developer and CI path.
- **Git tag (sv0c only):** **`bootstrap-sml-final`** on the **sv0c** repository â€” last revision where SML is the authoritative bootstrap **before** **`sml/`** â†’ **`sml-legacy/`**. Do **not** place this tag on the **sv0-toolchain** meta-repo. The meta-repo **README** lists the tag next to the **pinned sv0c SHA**; **update that SHA** whenever the **`sv0c`** submodule pointer changes (same commit as the bump).
- **Layout at retirement:** **`sv0c/sml/`** â†’ **`sv0c/sml-legacy/`**; **`make`** / **`./scripts/sv0`** compile SML only via **explicit legacy** targets documented in **sv0c** README.
- **Cold bootstrap / recovery:** document how to build from **`bootstrap-sml-final` + `sml-legacy/`** if the self-host chain breaks.

### feature parity and VM

- **M3 is not complete** until the **sv0** compiler matches the **SML** compiler for **language surface and semantics** (feature parity) **and** the **VM** path is **fully functional** for real programs (not â€śC-only self-host is enoughâ€ť).

### parity proof (â€śsplit contractâ€ť, preference strict)

- **VM:** **strict** parity â€” **sv0-emitted bytecode** matches **SML-emitted reference** for every program in the **v1 corpus**, except items on a written **allowlist** (intentional deltas only).
- **Diagnostics / frontend:** **behavioral** parity first (accept/reject, stable codes or categories where defined); **prefer tightening toward strict** (message text, ordering) over time.

### VM corpus v1

- **New curated suite** (explicit manifest + SML goldens), e.g. under **`sv0c/test/vm-parity/`** or as agreed â€” **not** â€śentire `./scripts/sv0 test`â€ť on day one.
- **Initial size:** **~50â€“100** programs for depth; expand as features land.

## completion criteria (refine as you implement)

- **full pipeline in sv0**: lexer â†’ parser â†’ name resolution â†’ type check â†’ contracts â†’ IR â†’ **C backend** and **VM backend**; **feature parity** with SML on the agreed surface and semantics.
- **self-compile**: documented recipe: **sv0** compiler builds **sv0** sources end-to-end; cold path from **`bootstrap-sml-final`** / **`sml-legacy/`** documented until optional binary-only bootstrap exists.
- **VM strict parity v1**: curated **~50â€“100** programs, **SML golden bytecode**, sv0 matches except **allowlist**.
- **diagnostics**: behavioral baseline; tighten toward **strict** where practical (see above).
- **SML retirement**: tag **`bootstrap-sml-final`** on **sv0c** (not the meta-repo); **`sml/`** â†’ **`sml-legacy/`**; default build is **sv0-only**; recovery documented.

## remaining work vs definition of done

milestone **3** is **not** complete until the bullets above hold. todayâ€™s repo state (for orientation only â€” grows with commits):

- **done-ish (harness + slices):** **`sv0c/lib/`**, **`lexer/`**, **`parser/`** hold **transliterated seeds**; **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`** + **`lib/golden/stage0/*.c`** lock **stage0** C output; **`./scripts/sv0 test`** runs **bootstrap-build**, golden **diff**, and integration tests.
- **not done (core M3):** most of **`sv0c/sml/`** still has **no** corresponding **sv0** module; **no** documented **sv0â†’sv0** self-compile loop; **no** **vm-parity v1** suite (50â€“100 programs, SML goldens); **SML** still **authoritative**; **feature parity**, **VM bar**, and **SML retirement** (tag + **`sml-legacy/`**) are **not** satisfied.

closing M3 is **sequenced transliteration + parity + bootstrap story** (phases below), not a single PR.

## phases (add `/include:` child tasks as modules migrate)

### phase 1: module graph and build order

**Plan (living doc):** `sv0c/lib/LAYOUT.md` â€” directories, transliteration order, stage0 vs stage1 C compare workflow.

**Tooling (meta-repo):** `sv0c/lib/bootstrap-sources.list` drives `./scripts/sv0 bootstrap-build`. For C snapshots use `./scripts/sv0 self-host-capture-stage0 <path-relative-to-sv0c/>` and, when stage1 exists, `./scripts/sv0 self-host-compare <stem>`. One-off C to stdout: `./scripts/sv0 emit-c <rel>`.

**CI:** `run test` / `ci` runs `bootstrap-build`, then for each list entry that has `lib/golden/stage0/<stem>.c`, emits C via the SML heap compiler and **`diff`**s against that golden (update the golden intentionally when the C backend output changes). Stage-1 parity remains `./scripts/sv0 self-host-compare <stem>` when `stage1/*.c` exists.

### phase 2: transliteration completion

/ai: track each SML component â†’ sv0 module; use a checklist table in this file or a child `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-checklist.Rmd`.

### phase 3: parity and regression

Implement **VM strict parity v1**: curated **~50â€“100** programs, SML-produced **golden bytecode**, comparison harness in CI; maintain an explicit **allowlist** for bytecode deltas. **Diagnostics:** start from **behavioral** parity on a shared accept/reject corpus; tighten toward **strict** per stakeholder preference. Keep **stage0** / bootstrap **C** goldens for **`lib/`** seeds as today unless superseded by a wider policy.

### phase 4: archive bootstrap

Apply tag **`bootstrap-sml-final`** on **sv0c** only; move **`sv0c/sml/`** â†’ **`sv0c/sml-legacy/`**; remove SML from default **make** / **`./scripts/sv0`** paths; document **legacy** build targets, **version pins**, and **recovery** if self-host breaks.

## refinement log

- 2026-03-25: initial scaffold from design milestone 3.
- 2026-04-01: compiler-in-sv0 sources stay in **sv0c** (extend **`lib/`** and/or add further dirs under `sv0c/`); no separate meta-repo `sv0-compiler/` root.
- 2026-04-01: phase 1 scaffold â€” `LAYOUT.md`, source list + golden C, `scripts/sv0` commands `emit-c`, `self-host-capture-stage0`, `self-host-compare`.
- 2026-04-01: CI compares bootstrap C to `lib/golden/stage0/<stem>.c` for each listed bootstrap-in-sv0 program that has a golden file (`self-host-check-golden`).
- 2026-04-02: **`sml/`** = SML bootstrap; **`lib/`** + **`lexer/`**â€¦ = sv0 track; **`lib/golden/`**; recursive **`--project`**; **`bootstrap-build`** / **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**.
- 2026-04-03: **`lib/diagnostic_core.sv0`** â€” next transliteration after **`span_core`** (`sml/error/diagnostic.*` subset); stage0 golden **`diagnostic_core.c`**.
- 2026-04-04: **sv0vm** â€” `CALL` binds actuals left-to-right; **`RETURN_SLOTS`** does not reverse multi-slot returns (struct return to caller). **`diagnostic_core`** scalar **`format_*`** helpers; VM regression **`test/integration/call_arg_order`**. New seeds **`lib/diagnostic_batch_core.sv0`**, **`lib/env_core.sv0`**, **`lexer/token_keyword_core.sv0`** + goldens + **`bootstrap-sources.list`**.
- 2026-04-05: **`lib/resolver_value_core.sv0`**, **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** + goldens â€” lexer + name-resolution seeds in parallel.
- 2026-04-06: **`lib/resolver_arity_core.sv0`**, **`lib/env_scope_core.sv0`** + goldens â€” call arity + scoped locals.
- 2026-04-07: **`lib/lookup_value_core.sv0`** â€” merged env (**`lookupValue`** order); **`env_core`** / **`env_scope_core`** kept as smaller slices.
- 2026-04-08: **`lib/resolver_call_core.sv0`**, **`lib/lookup_type_core.sv0`** + goldens â€” call resolution + type path slice.
- 2026-04-09: **`lib/type_alias_core.sv0`** (`resolveCanonicalTy` / `tyAlias`) â€” **high** value for **`lookupType`** + resolver; **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** â€” **medium** value lexer tag band. Bootstrap list + goldens.
- 2026-04-10: **`lib/lookup_type_alias_core.sv0`** â€” single struct + **`lookup_type_resolved`** (canonicalize then prelude/mod; **Self** bypasses aliases); primary reference for type-path testing vs **`env.sml`**.
- 2026-04-11: **`parser/expr_entry_core.sv0`** â€” **`parsePrimaryExpr`** first-token dispatch table + bridges to **`token_keyword_core`** / **`token_delim_core`**; **`primary_arm_is_compound`**.
- 2026-04-12: **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** â€” **`[`** / **`]`** tags **16**/**17**; **`parser/expr_entry_core`** uses **16** for **`LBRACKET`** (aligned with delim seed).
- 2026-04-13: **`parser/item_entry_core.sv0`** â€” **`parseItem`** first-token dispatch (clearer than block **`tryStmt`**); **`tag_kw_fn`** bridge.
- 2026-04-14: **`parser/stmt_entry_core.sv0`** â€” **`tryStmt`** dispatch (**let â†’ break â†’ continue â†’ assert â†’** **`tryAssignStmt`**); bridges **`tag_kw_let`**, assert **56**; **`parseBlock`** **`parseExpr`** fallback noted.
- 2026-04-15: **`lexer/token_keyword_core.sv0`** â€” **`tag_kw_break`**/**`tag_kw_continue`** (**4**/**5**); **`stmt_entry_core`** uses them (replaces **190**/**191** stand-ins); refreshed goldens.
- 2026-04-16: **`parser/assign_lhs_core.sv0`** â€” **`parseAssignTarget`** depth shapes + **`tryParseAssignLHS`** entry / assign-tail; one **`+=`** binop stand-in **211**.
- 2026-04-17: **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** â€” **`tag_delim_dot`** (**18**), **`tag_delim_eq`** (**19**, **`Token.EQ`**); **`assign_lhs_core`** aligned; goldens refreshed.
- 2026-04-18: **`parser/try_assign_stmt_core.sv0`** â€” **`tryAssignStmt`** with **one-token RHS** + **`;`**; rejects **`==`**, missing **`;`**.
- 2026-04-19: **`parser/assign_binop_core.sv0`** â€” **`assignBinop`** band **211â€“220** + ast ids **1â€“10**; **`assign_lhs_core`** / **`try_assign_stmt_core`** use full binop set for follow tokens.
- 2026-04-20: **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** â€” **`tag_op_pluseq`**â€¦**`tag_op_gtgteq`** (**211â€“220**) + **`is_compound_assign_tag`**; aligns with **`assign_binop_core`**.
- 2026-04-21: **`parser/expr_rhs_stub_core.sv0`** â€” assignment RHS stub (**atom** / **`lit + lit`**); **`try_assign_stmt_core`** uses **`rhs_stub_ok_with_semi`** (names avoid **`then`**/**`ident`** lexer pitfalls in identifiers). *Next:* wider RHS / Pratt slice.
- 2026-04-22: **`try_assign_deref_op_rhs_stub`** â€” deref LHS + same RHS stub as ident path (**`*x = 1 + 2`**); keeps assign story testable before full **`parseExpr`**. *Next:* Pratt slice or field path + binop RHS.
- 2026-04-23: **`try_assign_field_op_rhs_stub`** â€” field LHS (**`ident . ident`**) + binop RHS stub (**`a.b = 1 + 2`**). *Next:* Pratt or deeper LHS (index, nested field).
- 2026-04-24: **`try_assign_index_op_rhs_stub`** â€” **`ident [ int_lit ]`** + binop RHS stub; index operand is literal **40** only in this seed. *Next:* Pratt (precedence) or compound index / nested LHS.
- 2026-04-25: **`expr_pratt_stub_core`** â€” two-level precedence slice (**tag_op_star** **22** tighter than **tag_op_plus** **20**). *Next:* wire into **`try_assign`** RHS or grow **`parseExpr`** in SML then transliterate.
- 2026-04-26: **`try_assign_id_op_pratt_rhs_stub`** â€” ident-assign path accepts Pratt window (**`x = 1+2*3`**, **`+= 1*2+3`**). *Next:* same for deref / field / index LHS, or SML **`parseExpr`** slice.
- 2026-04-27: **`try_assign_{deref,field,index}_op_pratt_rhs_stub`** â€” Pratt RHS on all simple LHS shapes. *Next:* SML **`parseExpr`** subsection seed or wider Pratt (unary **`-`**, longer chains).
- 2026-04-28: **`parser/expr_prec_ladder_core.sv0`** â€” **`prec_binary_rank`** / add vs mul layer predicates vs **`token_op_core`**; comment maps **`parser.sml`** chain through **`parseLeftAssoc`**. *Next:* unary **`-`** Pratt / **`parseCastExpr`** slice ( **`%`** added **2026-04-29**).
- 2026-04-29: **`lexer/token_op_core`** â€” **`tag_op_percent`** (**29**, mul tier with **22**/**23**); operator band **20â€“29**; **`expr_prec_ladder_core`** uses **`is_mul_tier_tag`**. *Next:* unary **`-`** in Pratt stub, or **`parseCastExpr`** seed.
- 2026-04-30: Pratt RHS â€” optional unary **21** (**`parseUnaryExpr`** slice); six-token cap still rejects **` - a+b*c ;`** without a seventh slot. *Next:* **`pratt_rhs` t0..t6** or **`parseCastExpr`** stub.
- 2026-05-01: **`pratt_rhs_ok_with_semi7`** + **`stub7`** assign helpers â€” full unary Pratt chain in seven RHS slots. *Next:* **`parseCastExpr`** seed or binary **MINUS** in **`pratt_from_atom`**.
- 2026-05-02: Binary **MINUS** in **`pratt_from_atom`** (**`pratt_is_add_binop`**). *Next:* **`parseCastExpr`** stub or chained add-tier (**`a+b+c ;`**) with wider window.
- 2026-05-03: **`parser/expr_cast_core.sv0`** â€” **`parse_cast_stub_ok_with_semi`** (**`1 ;`**, **`x ;`**, **`1 as i32 ;`**, **`x as i32 ;`**); **`tok_as_kw` = 61**; golden + list. *Next:* chained **`as`** or **`parseType`** slice.
- 2026-05-04: **`parse_cast_stub_ok_with_semi6`** â€” up to **two** **`as`** + **IDENT** type slots (**73**); rejects third **`as`** in six slots. *Next:* **`parseType`** seed or wider window.
- 2026-05-05: **`parser/type_parse_core.sv0`** â€” **`parseType`** prefix: **`()`** + **IDENT**; cross-ref **token_delim** **10**/**11**. *Next:* wire into **`expr_cast_core`** or tuple slice.
- 2026-05-06: **`include`** preprocessor + **`token_type_stub`**; shared **IDENT** / primitive-type helpers; lexer block-comment note in **`sv0c/doc/transliteration-include.md`**; refreshed **`expr_cast_core`** / **`type_parse_core`** stage0 goldens.
- 2026-05-07: CI guard **`scripts/check_sv0_block_comment_nesting.py`** (nested **`/*`** in **`/* â€¦ */`**) wired into **`sv0 test`**.
- 2026-05-08: guard scans **sv0c** + **sv0doc** + **sv0vm** + **sv0-mcp** roots (present dirs only).
- 2026-05-09: **`type_parse_prefix`** include; **cast** stub **7**-slot + **`parseType`** unit type; block-comment / comment-snare lines in **`.sv0`** covered by **`check_sv0_block_comment_nesting.py`**.
- 2026-05-10: **`parser/expr_unary_stub_core.sv0`** â€” dedicated **`parseUnaryExpr`** transliteration seed (unary chain + atom) vs **`parser.sml`**; **`lib/lower_unop_core.sv0`** â€” IR unary lowering slice vs **`lowering.sml`** (**Neg**/**Not**/**BitNot** vs **addr-of** path); **`bootstrap-sources.list`** + stage0 goldens; parent-repo **`verify_sv0doc_baseline`** ties **sv0doc** bytecode stubs into the same **`sv0 test`** run as compiler seeds.
- 2026-05-11: Docs + tracking aligned with **`./scripts/sv0 test`** and milestones **0â€“3** snapshot in **`task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`**; **sv0-mcp** graph sync run after task/spec doc updates.
- 2026-05-12: **`sv0-mcp/README.md`** sync subsection; roadmap YAML fix; graph sync.
- 2026-05-13: **`scripts/sv0 test`** / **`make test`** help text documents **stage0** golden step; **`sv0 self-host-check-golden`** cross-ref unchanged.
- 2026-05-14: Workspace index documents **`make help`** vs **`./scripts/sv0`**; roadmap YAML spacing.
- 2026-05-15: **â€śRemaining work vs definition of doneâ€ť** â€” honest gap list (seeds + harness vs full **`sml/`** transliteration + self-compile); YAML **`updated:`** spacing; README links M3 **in progress**.
- 2026-05-16: YAML **`updated:`** / **`state:`** spacing normalized (graph sync).
- 2026-04-02: Parent **`verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** + **`sv0 test`** hook; **`state: done`** on **`task/sv0c-*.Rmd`** hub files (graph-safe).
- 2026-05-17: **Stakeholder decisions** â€” retire SML after **feature parity** + **full VM**; **strict** bytecode parity on **curated ~50â€“100** program VM suite (SML goldens) with allowlist; diagnostics **behavioral â†’ strict** preference; retirement = tag **`bootstrap-sml-final`**, **`sml/`** â†’ **`sml-legacy/`**, sv0-only default build.
- 2026-05-18: **`bootstrap-sml-final`** lives **only** on **sv0c** (no duplicate tag on **sv0-toolchain** meta-repo).
- 2026-05-19: Meta-repo **README** table: tag name + **pinned sv0c SHA**; maintainers update SHA with every **sv0c** submodule bump.
- 2026-05-20: **`scripts/verify_readme_sv0c_gitlink.py`** in **`./scripts/sv0 test`** / **`test-guards`** â€” CI enforces README table vs **`git ls-tree HEAD sv0c`**.
- 2026-05-21: **VM parity v1** landed â€” **`sv0c/test/vm-parity/`** with **28** SML bytecode goldens (bootstrap-listed corpus); **`./scripts/sv0 test`** **`cmp`**s **`build/vm/*.sv0b`** after **`bootstrap-build`**. Grow manifest toward **50â€“100**; add **sv0**-emitted tier when compiler ready. Git tag **`vm-parity-v1`** on **sv0c** marks this baseline (not **`bootstrap-sml-final`**).
- 2026-05-22: Bootstrap + vm-parity manifest adds **4** VM integration programs (**`hello`**, **`contracts`**, **`call_arg_order`**, **`println_ok`**) â€” **32** SML goldens total. **`forall`/`exists`** contract goldens remain **C-only** until VM lowering supports them. Tag **`vm-parity-v1.1`** on **sv0c**.

## related

- `task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`
- `task/sv0c-milestone-1.Rmd` â€” reference bootstrap implementation
